designDecisions: PATH-based shim instead of binary replacement
Native AOT for shim binary -- sub-50ms cold start
gRPC over named pipes/Unix domain sockets for IPC
Protobuf wire protocol for schema-first compatibility
Generic Host for daemon lifecycle and DI
ConstrainedLanguage mode as baseline PowerShell enforcement
Custom PSHost + InitialSessionState for PowerShell interception
Platform enforcer abstraction with factory pattern
Composite event store with fan-out (SQLite + JSONL + webhook + OTEL)
System.Threading.Channels for pub/sub event broker
YAML policy format compatible with agentsh
YARP reverse proxy for LLM proxy
Native helper binaries for high-risk platform features
Minifilter driver communication via fltlib.dll P/Invoke

platformStrategies.linux: cgroups v2 + Landlock + seccomp-bpf + ptrace + eBPF + namespaces + Unix sockets
platformStrategies.macos: Endpoint Security + sandbox-exec + Network Extension + FSEvents + RLIMIT + XPC
platformStrategies.windows: Job Objects + minifilter + ETW + AppContainer + AMSI + ConPTY + named pipes

architecture.summary: Complete architecture for agentpowershell -- a C#/.NET 9 PowerShell policy-enforced shell execution gateway with daemon+shim pattern, gRPC IPC, YAML-based first-match-wins policy engine, 70+ event types with composite fan-out store, cross-platform enforcement via platform abstraction, LLM reverse proxy with DLP, MCP security monitoring, and multi-modal approval system.

instructions: Create src/AgentPowerShell.Core/ - core types, interfaces, policy engine
Create src/AgentPowerShell.Events/ - event system and audit
Set up project references, NuGet packages (YamlDotNet, Grpc.Net, System.CommandLine)
Create a basic default-policy.yml compatible with agentsh format
Ensure dotnet build succeeds with empty placeholder classes
prompt.task: Create the .NET solution structure for agentpowershell
